result.reason: UI scaling issue on 4k monitors despite explicit PerMonitorV2 DPI awareness being set in ProgramRoot.cs. Requires investigation into specific UI components, layout, and potential WPF interop conflicts.
result.approach: Verify PerMonitorV2 activation at runtime, debug scaling behavior of FrmMain and its child controls (especially from external libraries like DockPanelSuite), and identify/correct hardcoded dimensions or pixel-based drawing. Investigate potential scaling conflicts arising from WinForms/WPF interop.
